ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., Regression, Classification) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parameter is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID being evaluated */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the model */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean square error of the model */,
  "penalty" REAL /* Penalty imposed on the model */,
  "kappa" INTEGER /* Kappa statistic for the model */,
  "rho" REAL /* Correlation coefficient for the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error */,
  "train_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training log ID */,
  "test_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test log ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records in the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, validation, testing) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public, client-provided) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, SQL, Parquet) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID being trained */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset ID being used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version being trained */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset version being used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the training was conducted (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_logs_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_logs_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_train_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Financial Prediction, Image Classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "training_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the training parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the training parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parameter is required */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the training parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset ID used in testing */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the test dataset */,
  "train_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training log ID */,
  "test_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test log ID */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix for classification models */,
  "roc_curve_data" TEXT /* ROC curve data for classification models */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_log_id") REFERENCES test_logs ("test_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_train_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_log_id") REFERENCES train_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "test_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID being tested */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset ID being used */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time of the testing session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the testing session (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version being tested */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset version being used */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the testing was conducted (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the testing session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result ID */,
  "train_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training log ID */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the model (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_train_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_log_id") REFERENCES train_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model ID being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the audit findings */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result ID */,
  "train_log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training log ID */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the auditor */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the model (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_train_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_log_id") REFERENCES train_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
